            set_technology = { cv_mr_stealth = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # jump_stealth - 2005
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = jump_stealth }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 2005 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_fighters
                has_tech = hardware_XIII
            }
            set_technology = { jump_stealth = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_tactical_bombers
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1946 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1955 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1965 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1965 = yes

        if = {

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

tbm_grant_air_transport = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_air_transport_y1948 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # electronic_mechanical_engineering - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { electronic_mechanical_engineering = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # mechanical_computing - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanical_computing }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { mechanical_computing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # improved_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # advanced_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_electronics
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1936 = yes

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_fortification_tech - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_fortification_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { basic_fortification_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # coastal_fort_tech_1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = coastal_fort_tech_1 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { coastal_fort_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # basic_machine_tools - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_machine_tools }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { basic_machine_tools = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # concentrated_industry - 1936

#   year=2005 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[jet_engines, atomic_reactor_naval_II, hardware_XIII]

# atomic_reactor_fusion_III
#   year=2005 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[hardware_XIII, supercomputer_VI]

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1955 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1965 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1965 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1970 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1975 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1975 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1985 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1985 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1990 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1995 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1995 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2005 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2005 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # atomic_research - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = atomic_research }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
                has_tech = ww_pc
            }
            set_technology = { atomic_research = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_nuclear
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
                has_tech = hardware_VIII
            }
            set_technology = { icbm3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (13 techs) --

# radio_detection
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# centimetric_radar
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_0
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_I
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_II
#   year=1970 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_III
#   year=1980 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_IV
#   year=1990 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_V
#   year=2000 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_VI
#   year=2010 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radar_VII
#   year=2020 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1970 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1990 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1941 = yes

tbm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1939 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # motorized_rocket_unit - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = motorized_rocket_unit }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
                has_tech = rocket_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { motorized_rocket_unit = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2005 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
                has_tech = hardware_XII
            }
            set_technology = { sam_short_range_5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # aam_short_range_5 - 2005
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = aam_short_range_5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2005 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
                has_tech = hardware_XIII
            }
            set_technology = { aam_short_range_5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # atgm_5 - 2005
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = atgm_5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2005 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
                has_tech = hardware_IX
            }
            set_technology = { atgm_5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # cruisemissile_5 - 2005
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = cruisemissile_5 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_industry value = 2005 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_rockets
                tbm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
                has_tech = hardware_X

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

tbm_grant_land_anti_air = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_air
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_air_y1943 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_anti_tank = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1935 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1935 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # photo_reconnaisance - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = photo_reconnaisance }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { photo_reconnaisance = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # sp_centrifugal_jet_tech - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_centrifugal_jet_tech }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
                NOT = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" }
            }
            set_technology = { sp_centrifugal_jet_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes

tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1970 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # spaag_3 - 1970
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = spaag_3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_tech = hardware_IV
            }
            set_technology = { spaag_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # heavy_artillery_3 - 1970
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_artillery_3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_tech = hardware_V
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_artillery_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # tank_destroyer_3 - 1970
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tank_destroyer_3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_tech = hardware_IV
            }
            set_technology = { tank_destroyer_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # light_artillery_3 - 1970
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = light_artillery_3 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1970 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_tech = hardware_III
            }
            set_technology = { light_artillery_3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1980 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # artillery_4 - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = artillery_4 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_tech = art_upgrade_3
                has_tech = art_ammo_3
                has_tech = hardware_VI
            }
            set_technology = { artillery_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # autocannon_4 - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = autocannon_4 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_tech = aa_upgrade_3
                has_tech = cannon_ammo_3
                has_tech = hardware_III
            }
            set_technology = { autocannon_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
        # direct_fire_gun_4 - 1980

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = direct_fire_gun_4 }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_anti_tank
                has_tech = hardware_III
            }
            set_technology = { direct_fire_gun_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_artillery = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

tbm_grant_land_artillery_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # basic_battery - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_battery }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_artillery
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_battery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_tanks_1
#   year=1942 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_tanks_2
#   year=1944 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tanks_1
#   year=1944 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_tanks_3
#   year=1947 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tanks_2
#   year=1947 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_tanks_4
#   year=1950 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[hardware_I]

# heavy_tanks_5
#   year=1960 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[hardware_III]

tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 2005 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_infantry_y2005 = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (14 techs) --

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tanks_1
#   year=1942 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tanks_2
#   year=1944 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tanks_3
#   year=1947 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tanks_4
#   year=1960 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[hardware_I]

# light_tanks_5
#   year=1975 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[hardware_IV]

# light_tanks_6
#   year=1995 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[hardware_VII]

tbm_grant_land_light_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1947 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1975 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1975 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1995 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1995 = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- LAND / MECHANISED (5 techs) --

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1940 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1942 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1944 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

tbm_grant_land_mechanised = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_mechanised_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- LAND / MEDIUM_TANKS (16 techs) --

# basic_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1938 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_tank
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tanks
#   year=1942 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tanks_1
#   year=1944 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tanks_2
#   year=1947 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tanks_3
#   year=1950 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_I]

# main_battle_tanks_4
#   year=1960 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_III]

# main_battle_tanks_5
#   year=1965 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_IV]

# main_battle_tanks_6
#   year=1975 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_VI]

# main_battle_tanks_7
#   year=1985 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_VII]

# main_battle_tanks_8
#   year=1995 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_IX]

# main_battle_tanks_9
#   year=2005 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_X]

tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_medium_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1947 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1965 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }

tbm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1938 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = tbm_cat_medium_tanks
            check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        # basic_medium_tank_chassis - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_grant_counter value = tbm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = tbm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = tbm_cat_medium_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_medium_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { tbm_grant_counter = 1 }
            tbm_handle_tech_grant_notification = yes
        }
    }
}
